name: Bujincandescence
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>武</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぶ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>籬</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>まがき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Beast-Warrior "Bujin" monsters you control cannot be destroyed by your opponent's card effects, except during the Battle Phase. Once per turn: You can send 1 "Bujin" monster from your hand or face-up field to the GY, then target 1 face-up card your opponent controls; negate its effects until the end of this turn. During your End Phase: You can send this face-up card from the field to the GY, then target 1 "Bujin" monster in your GY; Special Summon it.
eff: Beast-Warrior "Bujin" monsters you control cannot be destroyed by your opponent's card effects, except during the Battle Phase. Once per turn: You can send 1 "Bujin" monster from your hand or face-up field to the GY, then target 1 face-up card your opponent controls; negate its effects until the end of this turn. During your End Phase: You can send this face-up card from the field to the GY, then target 1 "Bujin" monster in your GY; Special Summon it.

action: Sends from hand to Graveyard for cost
Sends from field to Graveyard for cost
Sends itself from field to Graveyard for cost
mst: Cannot be destroyed by card effects
Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Negates the effects of your opponent's Spell Cards
Negates the effects of your opponent's Trap Cards
